GameConditionDef.label: ArchoWorm Incoming
GameConditionDef.description: An archoWorm unit will be deployed to your primary colony. If you abandon the colony before its arrival, you will permanently forfeit this archomechanical specimen.
GameConditionDef.letterText: 被投放的蠕虫抵达了你的基地,准备接收.

GameConditionDef.label: ArchoWorm Trial Imminent
GameConditionDef.description: An archoWorm combat unit is en route to your primary colony. Abandoning the colony prior to engagement will be considered trial failure.
GameConditionDef.letterText: 被投放的蠕虫抵达了你的基地,准备好战斗吧.
